name: Response

aliases.name: Response
aliases.comment: A response is an updated model and some cmd.

values.name: mapBoth
values.type: (m -> m_) -> (a -> a_) -> Response m a -> Response m_ a_

values.name: mapCmd
values.type: (a -> a_) -> Response m a -> Response m a_

values.name: mapModel
values.type: (m -> m_) -> Response m a -> Response m_ a

values.name: res
values.comment: Canonical usage: construct a result from model and cmd.
values.type: model -> Cmd msg -> Response model msg

values.name: taskRes
values.comment: Construct a result from model and task.
values.type: model -> (x -> msg) -> (a -> msg) -> Task x a -> Response model msg

values.name: withCmd
values.type: Cmd a -> m -> Response m a

values.name: withNone
withTask
values.type: (x -> msg) -> (a -> msg) -> Task x a -> model -> Response model msg
